name: delete_noc_connection
full_help:
delete_noc_connection

Description: 
Delete NOC Connection.

Syntax: 
delete_noc_connection  [-quiet] [-verbose] <connection>

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  <connection>  NOC Connection to delete.

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
